title: Show HN: Springdrift – A persistent runtime for long-lived LLM agents
summary: Springdrift is a new persistent, auditable runtime for long-lived LLM agents written in Gleam on the BEAM, designed to fill gaps in agent development. It offers features like ambient self-perception, introspection tooling, and a safety system based on computational ethics.
why_included: This is a new open-source project for LLM agents, indicating a novel approach to agent development.
